title: neuroloma articum
intro: Neuroloma articum, also known as the artichoke or globe artichoke, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Neuroloma articum lie in its leaves and flowers, which are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and silymarin, a compound known for its liver-protective properties. The health benefits of consuming Neuroloma articum include improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting liver function, as well as acting as a diuretic to aid in weight loss. Herbal preparations of Neuroloma articum include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
